done
}

######################################################################
# GAR Hallmark Enumeration (Registry API — shared by tally and batch_vouch)

# Internal: enumerate every ark under ${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/ via GAR REST.
# Writes "<hallmark> <basename>" pairs (one per line, sorted) to
# ZRBFC_HALLMARK_LIST_FILE. An empty file is a valid result (no hallmarks).
# Args: token
# Pagination: pageSize=1000 — deferred until evidence of >1000 packages.
zrbfc_list_hallmarks_capture() {
  zrbfc_sentinel

  local -r z_token="${1:?Token required}"

  local -r z_list_url="${ZRBFC_GAR_API_BASE}/${ZRBFC_GAR_PACKAGE_BASE}/packages?pageSize=1000"
  local -r z_list_infix="rbfc_list_hallmarks"
  local -r z_subtree="${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/"

  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_list_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_list_infix}"
  rbgu_http_require_ok "List hallmark packages" "${z_list_infix}"

  local -r z_resp_file="${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_list_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"
  local -r z_raw_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfc_hallmark_list_raw.txt"

  # GAR returns package names URL-encoded (slashes as %2F). Decode, strip the
  # API path prefix, filter to ${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/<hallmark>/<basename> shape
  # (length == 2 after split excludes anything deeper or shallower), emit as
  # space-separated pair lines.
  jq -r --arg subtree "${z_subtree}" '
    .packages[]?.name
    | sub("^.*/packages/"; "")
    | gsub("%2F"; "/")
    | select(startswith($subtree))
    | ltrimstr($subtree)
    | split("/")
    | select(length == 2)
    | "\(.[0]) \(.[1])"
  ' "${z_resp_file}" > "${z_raw_file}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to extract hallmark package list"

  sort "${z_raw_file}" > "${ZRBFC_HALLMARK_LIST_FILE}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to sort hallmark list"
}

######################################################################
# GAR Artifact Extraction (Registry API — no docker required)

# Internal: extract files from a FROM-scratch artifact in GAR to a local directory.
# Handles multi-platform manifest lists by picking the first platform (content is
# identical for architecture-independent artifacts like -about and -vouch).
# Args: token package tag extract_dir
# Returns: 0 if extraction succeeded, 1 if artifact not found in registry.
# Infrastructure failures (curl, jq, tar) are fatal via buc_die.
zrbfc_gar_extract_artifact() {
  zrbfc_sentinel

  local -r z_token="$1"
  local -r z_package="$2"
  local -r z_tag="$3"
  local -r z_extract_dir="$4"

  local -r z_safe_pkg="${z_package//\//_}"
  local -r z_prefix="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/gar_${z_safe_pkg}_${z_tag}_"

  # HEAD check — does the artifact exist?
  local -r z_head_status="${z_prefix}head_status.txt"
  local -r z_head_response="${z_prefix}head_response.txt"
  local -r z_head_stderr="${z_prefix}head_stderr.txt"
  curl --head -s \
    --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
    --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
    -H "Accept: ${ZRBFC_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}" \
    -w "%{http_code}" \
    -o "${z_head_response}" \
    "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_package}/manifests/${z_tag}" \
    > "${z_head_status}" 2>"${z_head_stderr}" \
    || buc_die "HEAD request failed for ${z_package}:${z_tag} — see ${z_head_stderr}"

  local -r z_http_code=$(<"${z_head_status}")
  test "${z_http_code}" = "200" || return 1

  # GET manifest (may be manifest list/index or single-platform manifest)
  local -r z_manifest="${z_prefix}manifest.json"
  local -r z_manifest_stderr="${z_prefix}manifest_stderr.txt"
  curl -sL \
    --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
    --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
    -H "Accept: ${ZRBFC_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}" \
    "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_package}/manifests/${z_tag}" \
    > "${z_manifest}" 2>"${z_manifest_stderr}" \
    || buc_die "GET manifest failed for ${z_package}:${z_tag} — see ${z_manifest_stderr}"

  # Resolve to a single-platform manifest
  local z_single_manifest="${z_manifest}"
  local -r z_media_type_file="${z_prefix}media_type.txt"
  jq -r '.mediaType // empty' "${z_manifest}" > "${z_media_type_file}" 2>/dev/null || true
  local -r z_media_type=$(<"${z_media_type_file}")

  case "${z_media_type}" in
    *manifest.list*|*image.index*)
      # Multi-platform manifest list — pick first platform's manifest
      local -r z_digest_file="${z_prefix}platform_digest.txt"
      jq -r '.manifests[0].digest // empty' "${z_manifest}" \
        > "${z_digest_file}" 2>/dev/null \
        || buc_die "Failed to extract platform digest from manifest list"
      local -r z_platform_digest=$(<"${z_digest_file}")
      test -n "${z_platform_digest}" || buc_die "Empty platform digest in manifest list"

      local -r z_plat_manifest="${z_prefix}plat_manifest.json"
      local -r z_plat_stderr="${z_prefix}plat_manifest_stderr.txt"
      curl -sL \
        --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
        --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
        -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
        -H "Accept: application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v2+json,application/vnd.oci.image.manifest.v1+json" \
        "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_package}/manifests/${z_platform_digest}" \
        > "${z_plat_manifest}" 2>"${z_plat_stderr}" \
        || buc_die "GET platform manifest failed for ${z_package} — see ${z_plat_stderr}"
      z_single_manifest="${z_plat_manifest}"
      ;;
  esac

  # Extract all layer digests. Buildkit FROM-scratch images emit one layer per
  # COPY instruction (rbgja04's about-image stacks six: sbom, build_info,
  # recipe.txt, buildkit_metadata.json, cache_before.json, cache_after.json),
  # so a single-layer extract loses everything past the first COPY.
  local -r z_layers_file="${z_prefix}layer_digests.txt"
  local -r z_layers_stderr="${z_prefix}layer_digests_stderr.txt"
  jq -r '.layers[].digest' "${z_single_manifest}" \
    > "${z_layers_file}" 2>"${z_layers_stderr}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to extract layer digests from manifest — see ${z_layers_stderr}"
  test -s "${z_layers_file}" \
    || buc_die "No layer digests in manifest for ${z_package}:${z_tag}"

  mkdir -p "${z_extract_dir}" || buc_die "Failed to create extraction directory: ${z_extract_dir}"

  # Load-then-iterate: file fully consumed and closed before curl/tar run, so
  # no child process can silently consume the loop's remaining input.
  local z_layer_digests=()
  local z_layer_line=""
  while IFS= read -r z_layer_line || test -n "${z_layer_line}"; do
    z_layer_digests+=("${z_layer_line}")
  done < "${z_layers_file}"

  # Fetch and extract each layer in manifest order. FROM-scratch COPY layers
  # add disjoint files, so accumulation needs no whiteout handling.
  local z_layer_digest=""
  local z_blob_file=""
  local z_blob_stderr=""
  local z_tar_stderr=""
  local z_layer_idx=0
  for z_layer_idx in "${!z_layer_digests[@]}"; do
    z_layer_digest="${z_layer_digests[$z_layer_idx]}"
    test -n "${z_layer_digest}" || continue
    z_blob_file="${z_prefix}blob_${z_layer_idx}.tar.gz"
    z_blob_stderr="${z_prefix}blob_${z_layer_idx}_stderr.txt"
    curl -sL \
      --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
      --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
      "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_package}/blobs/${z_layer_digest}" \
      > "${z_blob_file}" 2>"${z_blob_stderr}" \
      || buc_die "GET blob failed for ${z_package} layer ${z_layer_digest} — see ${z_blob_stderr}"

    z_tar_stderr="${z_prefix}tar_${z_layer_idx}_stderr.txt"
    tar -xzf "${z_blob_file}" -C "${z_extract_dir}" 2>"${z_tar_stderr}" \
      || buc_die "Failed to extract layer ${z_layer_digest} for ${z_package}:${z_tag} — see ${z_tar_stderr}"
  done

  return 0
}

# Resolve a hallmark's vessel by reading the vessel field from its vouch ark.
# Authenticates as Retriever, fetches the vouch ark, extracts vouch_summary.json,
# and emits the .vessel field. Single home for hallmark→vessel lookup; callers
# that need vessel identity for operation prose or logging route through here.
# Args: hallmark
# Emits: vessel sigil (e.g., "rbev-busybox")
rbfc_vessel_for_hallmark_capture() {
  zrbfc_sentinel

  local -r z_hallmark="${1:?Hallmark required}"

  test -f "${RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}" \
    || buc_die "Retriever credential not found: ${RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}"
  local z_token=""
  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}") \
    || buc_die "Failed to get Retriever OAuth token"

  local -r z_vouch_pkg="${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${z_hallmark}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_VOUCH}"
  local -r z_scratch="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfc_vessel_for_hallmark"
  rm -rf "${z_scratch}" || buc_die "Failed to clear scratch dir: ${z_scratch}"

  zrbfc_gar_extract_artifact "${z_token}" "${z_vouch_pkg}" "${z_hallmark}" "${z_scratch}" \
    || buc_die "Hallmark not found: ${z_hallmark} (no vouch ark at ${z_vouch_pkg}:${z_hallmark})"

  test -f "${z_scratch}/vouch_summary.json" \
    || buc_die "vouch_summary.json not found in vouch ark for ${z_hallmark}"

  local -r z_vessel_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfc_vessel_for_hallmark_value.txt"
  jq -r '.vessel // empty' "${z_scratch}/vouch_summary.json" > "${z_vessel_file}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to read vessel from vouch_summary.json"
  local -r z_vessel=$(<"${z_vessel_file}")
  test -n "${z_vessel}" || buc_die "Vessel field empty in vouch_summary.json"

  printf '%s\n' "${z_vessel}"
}

######################################################################
# Plumb (rbw-fpf / rbw-fpc)

# Internal: core plumb logic shared by full and compact modes.
# Queries GAR directly via Registry API — no local docker required.
# Authenticates as Retriever. Vessel is resolved from the hallmark's vouch ark.
# Args: hallmark mode
zrbfc_plumb_core() {
  zrbfc_sentinel

  local -r z_hallmark="${1:-}"
  local -r z_mode="${2}"

  test -n "${z_hallmark}" || buc_die "Hallmark parameter required"

  buc_step "Resolving vessel from vouch ark"
  local z_vessel=""
  z_vessel=$(rbfc_vessel_for_hallmark_capture "${z_hallmark}") \
    || buc_die "Failed to resolve vessel for hallmark: ${z_hallmark}"
  buc_info "Resolved hallmark to vessel: ${z_vessel}"

  rbfc_require_vessel_sigil "${z_vessel}"

  # Load vessel config (sets RBRV_VESSEL_MODE, RBRV_BIND_IMAGE, etc.)
  local -r z_vessel_dir="${RBRR_VESSEL_DIR}/${z_vessel}"
  zrbfc_load_vessel "${z_vessel_dir}"

  buc_step "Authenticating as Retriever"
  test -f "${RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}" \
    || buc_die "Retriever credential not found: ${RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}"
  local z_token=""
  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}") \
    || buc_die "Failed to get Retriever OAuth token"

  local -r z_extract="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/plumb"
  mkdir -p "${z_extract}" || buc_die "Failed to create extraction directory"
  local z_has_about=false
  local z_has_vouch=false

  # Fetch about ark from GAR (tag = hallmark)
  buc_step "Fetching about ark from GAR"
  local -r z_about_pkg="${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${z_hallmark}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ABOUT}"
  local -r z_about_dir="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/plumb_about"
  if zrbfc_gar_extract_artifact "${z_token}" "${z_about_pkg}" "${z_hallmark}" "${z_about_dir}"; then
    z_has_about=true
    cp "${z_about_dir}"/* "${z_extract}/" 2>/dev/null || true
  fi

  # Fetch vouch ark for content (vessel resolution already extracted it once above)
  buc_step "Fetching vouch ark from GAR"
  local -r z_vouch_pkg="${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${z_hallmark}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_VOUCH}"
  local -r z_vouch_dir="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/plumb_vouch"
  if zrbfc_gar_extract_artifact "${z_token}" "${z_vouch_pkg}" "${z_hallmark}" "${z_vouch_dir}"; then
    z_has_vouch=true
    cp "${z_vouch_dir}"/* "${z_extract}/" 2>/dev/null || true
  fi

  # Bind vessels: fallback to static display if no about ark
  if test "${RBRV_VESSEL_MODE}" = "bind" && test "${z_has_about}" = "false"; then
    zrbfc_plumb_show_bind "${z_vessel}" "${z_hallmark}" "${z_mode}"
    return 0
  fi

  # Require about ark for non-bind vessels
  if test "${z_has_about}" = "false"; then
    buc_die "About ark not found in GAR: ${z_about_pkg}:${z_hallmark}"
  fi

17	# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
18	#
19	# Recipe Bottle Foundry Verify - about, vouch, and batch_vouch operations (director credentials)
20	
21	set -euo pipefail
22	
23	# Multiple inclusion detection
24	test -z "${ZRBFV_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbfv multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
25	ZRBFV_SOURCED=1
26	
27	# Source shared Foundry Core module
28	source "${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}/rbfc_FoundryCore.sh"
29	
30	######################################################################
31	# Internal Functions (zrbfv_*)
32	
33	zrbfv_kindle() {
34	  test -z "${ZRBFV_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbfv already kindled"
35	
36	  buc_log_args 'Validate Foundry Core is kindled'
37	  zrbfc_sentinel
38	
39	  buc_log_args 'Verify Director RBRA file'
40	  test -n "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE:-}" || buc_die "RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE not set"
41	  test -f "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}"   || buc_die "GCB service env file not found: ${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}"
42	
43	  buc_log_args 'Define vouch operation file prefix'
44	  readonly ZRBFV_VOUCH_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfv_vouch_"
45	
46	  buc_log_args 'Define about operation file prefix'
47	  readonly ZRBFV_ABOUT_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfv_about_"
48	
49	  buc_log_args 'Define graft metadata operation file prefix'
50	  readonly ZRBFV_GRAFT_META_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfv_graft_meta_"
51	
52	  readonly ZRBFV_KINDLED=1
53	}
54	
55	zrbfv_sentinel() {
56	  zrbfc_sentinel
57	  test "${ZRBFV_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbfv not kindled - call zrbfv_kindle first"
58	}
59	
60	######################################################################
61	# Public Functions (rbfv_*)
62	
63	rbfv_vouch_gate() {
64	  zrbfv_sentinel
65	
66	  local -r z_vessel="${1:-}"
67	  local -r z_hallmark="${2:-}"
68	
69	  test -n "${z_vessel}"       || buc_die "rbfv_vouch_gate: vessel required"
70	  test -n "${z_hallmark}" || buc_die "rbfv_vouch_gate: hallmark required"
71	
72	  local -r z_registry_host="${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}"
73	  local -r z_registry_api_base="https://${z_registry_host}/v2/${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
74	
75	  # Vouch package = hallmarks/<H>/vouch, tag = <H> (hallmark-as-tag).
76	  local -r z_vouch_tag="${z_hallmark}"
77	  buc_step "Vouch gate: checking ${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${z_hallmark}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_VOUCH}:${z_vouch_tag}"
78	
79	  local z_token
80	  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") \
81	    || buc_die "rbfv_vouch_gate: failed to get Director OAuth token"
82	
83	  local z_vouch_http_code
84	  curl --head -s \
85	    --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
86	    --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
87	    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
88	    -o /dev/null \
89	    -w "%{http_code}" \
90	    "${z_registry_api_base}/${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${z_hallmark}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_VOUCH}/manifests/${z_vouch_tag}" \
91	    > "${ZRBFC_SCRATCH_FILE}" \
92	    || buc_die "rbfv_vouch_gate: HEAD request failed for ${z_vessel}:${z_vouch_tag}"
93	  z_vouch_http_code=$(<"${ZRBFC_SCRATCH_FILE}")
94	
95	  if test "${z_vouch_http_code}" != "200"; then
96	    buc_die "Hallmark not vouched: ${z_hallmark} (HTTP ${z_vouch_http_code} — refusing to use unvouched image)"
97	  fi
98	
99	  buc_info "Vouch verified: ${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${z_hallmark}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_VOUCH}:${z_vouch_tag}"
100	}
101	
102	rbfv_about() {
103	  zrbfv_sentinel
104	
105	  local -r z_hallmark="${2:-}"
106	  local -r z_conjure_build_id="${3:-}"  # Optional: conjure BUILD_ID for provenance
107	
108	  buc_doc_brief "Assemble about metadata artifact for an existing hallmark image"
109	  buc_doc_param "vessel" "Vessel sigil or path to vessel directory"
110	  buc_doc_param "hallmark" "Full hallmark (e.g., c260305133650-r260305160530)"
111	  buc_doc_param "conjure_build_id" "(Optional) Cloud Build job ID from conjure"
112	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
113	
114	  # Resolve vessel argument (sigil or path) and load
115	  zrbfc_resolve_vessel "${1:-}"
116	  local -r z_vessel_dir=$(<"${ZRBFC_VESSEL_RESOLVED_DIR_FILE}")
117	  test -n "${z_vessel_dir}" || buc_die "Empty resolved vessel path"
118	  zrbfc_load_vessel "${z_vessel_dir}"
119	  test -n "${z_hallmark}" || buc_die "Hallmark parameter required"
120	
121	  buc_step "Loading Director RBRA credentials"
122	  source "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to source Director RBRA"
123	
124	  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
125	  local z_token=""
126	  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") \
127	    || buc_die "Failed to get Director OAuth token"
128	
129	  # Gate: require image exists. Image package = hallmarks/<H>/image, tag = <H>.
130	  buc_step "Gating on image artifact existence"
131	  local -r z_hallmark_subtree="${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${z_hallmark}"
132	  local -r z_image_gate_status="${ZRBFV_ABOUT_PREFIX}image_status.txt"
133	  local -r z_image_gate_response="${ZRBFV_ABOUT_PREFIX}image_response.json"
134	  local -r z_image_gate_stderr="${ZRBFV_ABOUT_PREFIX}image_stderr.txt"
135	
136	  curl --head -s \
137	    --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
138	    --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
139	    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
140	    -H "Accept: ${ZRBFC_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}" \
141	    -w "%{http_code}" \
142	    -o "${z_image_gate_response}" \
143	    "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_hallmark_subtree}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE}/manifests/${z_hallmark}" \
144	    > "${z_image_gate_status}" 2>"${z_image_gate_stderr}" \
145	    || buc_die "HEAD request failed for image artifact — see ${z_image_gate_stderr}"
146	
147	  local -r z_image_http_code=$(<"${z_image_gate_status}")
148	  test -n "${z_image_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for image"
149	  test "${z_image_http_code}" = "200" \
150	    || buc_die "Image artifact not found (HTTP ${z_image_http_code}) — image must exist before about"
151	
152	  buc_info "Image artifact confirmed: ${z_hallmark_subtree}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE}:${z_hallmark}"
153	
154	  # Gate: warn if about already exists (re-about is idempotent overwrite)
155	  local -r z_about_gate_status="${ZRBFV_ABOUT_PREFIX}about_status.txt"
156	  local -r z_about_gate_response="${ZRBFV_ABOUT_PREFIX}about_response.json"
157	  local -r z_about_gate_stderr="${ZRBFV_ABOUT_PREFIX}about_stderr.txt"
158	
159	  curl --head -s \
160	    --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
161	    --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
162	    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
163	    -H "Accept: ${ZRBFC_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}" \
164	    -w "%{http_code}" \
165	    -o "${z_about_gate_response}" \
166	    "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_hallmark_subtree}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ABOUT}/manifests/${z_hallmark}" \
167	    > "${z_about_gate_status}" 2>"${z_about_gate_stderr}" \
168	    || buc_die "HEAD request failed for about artifact — see ${z_about_gate_stderr}"
169	
170	  local -r z_about_http_code=$(<"${z_about_gate_status}")
171	  test -n "${z_about_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for about"
172	  if test "${z_about_http_code}" = "200"; then
173	    buc_warn "Re-about in progress: ${z_hallmark_subtree}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ABOUT}:${z_hallmark} already exists"
174	  fi
175	
176	  # Submit about Cloud Build
177	  zrbfv_about_submit "${z_hallmark}" "${z_token}" "${z_conjure_build_id}"
178	
179	  buc_success "About complete: ${z_hallmark}"
180	  buc_info "About artifact: ${z_hallmark_subtree}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ABOUT}:${z_hallmark}"
181	}
182	
183	# Internal: submit combined about+vouch Cloud Build job for graft mode.
184	# Eliminates the orphan gap between standalone about and vouch by running
185	# both step sets in a single GCB submission.
186	# Args: vessel_dir hallmark
187	zrbfv_graft_metadata_submit() {
188	  zrbfv_sentinel
189	
190	  local -r z_vessel_dir="$1"
191	  local -r z_hallmark="$2"
192	
193	  # Load vessel (follows reload pattern used by rbfv_about/rbfv_vouch)
194	  zrbfc_load_vessel "${z_vessel_dir}"
195	  test -n "${z_hallmark}" || buc_die "Hallmark parameter required"
196	
197	  buc_step "Loading Director RBRA credentials"
198	  source "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to source Director RBRA"
199	
200	  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
201	  local z_token=""
202	  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") \
203	    || buc_die "Failed to get Director OAuth token"
204	
205	  buc_step "Constructing combined about+vouch Cloud Build resource"
206	  local -r z_gar_host="${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}"
207	  local -r z_gar_path="${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
208	  local -r z_mason_sa="projects/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/serviceAccounts/${RBGD_MASON_EMAIL}"
209	
210	  # Gate: require image exists (graft push must have completed)
211	  buc_step "Gating on image artifact existence"
212	  local -r z_hallmark_subtree="${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${z_hallmark}"
213	  local -r z_image_gate_status="${ZRBFV_GRAFT_META_PREFIX}image_status.txt"
214	  local -r z_image_gate_response="${ZRBFV_GRAFT_META_PREFIX}image_response.json"
215	  local -r z_image_gate_stderr="${ZRBFV_GRAFT_META_PREFIX}image_stderr.txt"
216	
217	  curl --head -s \
218	    --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
219	    --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
220	    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
221	    -H "Accept: ${ZRBFC_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}" \
222	    -w "%{http_code}" \
223	    -o "${z_image_gate_response}" \
224	    "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_hallmark_subtree}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE}/manifests/${z_hallmark}" \
225	    > "${z_image_gate_status}" 2>"${z_image_gate_stderr}" \
226	    || buc_die "HEAD request failed for image artifact — see ${z_image_gate_stderr}"
227	
228	  local -r z_image_http_code=$(<"${z_image_gate_status}")
229	  test -n "${z_image_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for image"
230	  test "${z_image_http_code}" = "200" \
231	    || buc_die "Image artifact not found (HTTP ${z_image_http_code}) — graft push must complete before about+vouch"
232	
233	  buc_info "Image artifact confirmed: ${z_hallmark_subtree}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE}:${z_hallmark}"
234	
235	  # Git metadata (shared temp files, idempotent)
236	  zrbfc_ensure_git_metadata
237	  local z_git_commit=""
238	  z_git_commit=$(<"${ZRBFC_GIT_COMMIT_FILE}")
239	  local z_git_branch=""
240	  z_git_branch=$(<"${ZRBFC_GIT_BRANCH_FILE}")
241	  local z_git_repo=""
242	  z_git_repo=$(<"${ZRBFC_GIT_REPO_FILE}")
243	
244	  # Graft-specific about substitution values
245	  local -r z_graft_source="${RBRV_GRAFT_IMAGE:-}"
246	  local z_dockerfile_content=""
247	  local -r z_dockerfile_max_bytes=4000
248	  if test -n "${RBRV_GRAFT_OPTIONAL_DOCKERFILE:-}" && test -f "${RBRV_GRAFT_OPTIONAL_DOCKERFILE}"; then
249	    local -r z_df_size_file="${ZRBFV_GRAFT_META_PREFIX}df_size.txt"
250	    wc -c < "${RBRV_GRAFT_OPTIONAL_DOCKERFILE}" > "${z_df_size_file}" \
251	      || buc_die "Failed to measure Dockerfile size"
252	    local z_df_size=""
253	    z_df_size=$(<"${z_df_size_file}")
254	    z_df_size="${z_df_size// /}"
255	    if test "${z_df_size}" -le "${z_dockerfile_max_bytes}"; then
256	      z_dockerfile_content=$(<"${RBRV_GRAFT_OPTIONAL_DOCKERFILE}")
257	    else
258	      buc_warn "Dockerfile exceeds 4KB substitution limit (${z_df_size} bytes) — recipe.txt omitted"
259	    fi
260	  fi
261	
262	  # === Assemble about steps ===
263	  local -r z_about_steps_file="${ZRBFV_GRAFT_META_PREFIX}about_steps.json"
264	  zrbfc_assemble_about_steps "${z_about_steps_file}" "${ZRBFV_GRAFT_META_PREFIX}about_"
265	
266	  # === Resolve base image provenance (for vouch summary) ===
267	  # New layout: anchored base images live at <ENSHRINES_ROOT>/<anchor>:<anchor>
268	  local -r z_vi_gar_repo_base="${z_gar_host}/${z_gar_path}"
269	  local z_vi_ref_1="" z_vi_ref_2="" z_vi_ref_3=""
270	  local z_vi_prov_1="" z_vi_prov_2="" z_vi_prov_3=""
271	  local z_vi_n="" z_vi_origin_var="" z_vi_anchor_var="" z_vi_origin="" z_vi_anchor=""
272	  for z_vi_n in 1 2 3; do
273	    z_vi_origin_var="RBRV_IMAGE_${z_vi_n}_ORIGIN"
274	    z_vi_anchor_var="RBRV_IMAGE_${z_vi_n}_ANCHOR"
275	    z_vi_origin="${!z_vi_origin_var:-}"
276	    z_vi_anchor="${!z_vi_anchor_var:-}"
277	    test -n "${z_vi_origin}" || continue
278	    local z_vi_ref="" z_vi_prov=""
279	    if test -n "${z_vi_anchor}"; then
280	      z_vi_ref="${z_vi_gar_repo_base}/${RBGL_ENSHRINES_ROOT}/${z_vi_anchor}:${z_vi_anchor}"
281	      z_vi_prov="anchored"
282	    else
283	      z_vi_ref="${z_vi_origin}"
284	      z_vi_prov="pass-through"
285	    fi
286	    case "${z_vi_n}" in
287	      1) z_vi_ref_1="${z_vi_ref}"; z_vi_prov_1="${z_vi_prov}" ;;
288	      2) z_vi_ref_2="${z_vi_ref}"; z_vi_prov_2="${z_vi_prov}" ;;
289	      3) z_vi_ref_3="${z_vi_ref}"; z_vi_prov_3="${z_vi_prov}" ;;
290	    esac
291	  done
292	
293	  # === Assemble vouch steps ===
294	  local -r z_vouch_steps_file="${ZRBFV_GRAFT_META_PREFIX}vouch_steps.json"
295	  zrbfc_assemble_vouch_steps "${z_vouch_steps_file}" "${ZRBFV_GRAFT_META_PREFIX}vouch_"
296	
297	  # === Combine: about steps + vouch steps ===
298	  local -r z_combined_steps="${ZRBFV_GRAFT_META_PREFIX}combined_steps.json"
299	  jq -s '.[0] + .[1]' "${z_about_steps_file}" "${z_vouch_steps_file}" \
300	    > "${z_combined_steps}" || buc_die "Failed to combine about and vouch steps"
301	
302	  # Compose Build resource JSON with both _RBGA_ and _RBGV_ substitutions
303	  buc_log_args "Composing combined about+vouch Build resource JSON"
304	  local -r z_build_file="${ZRBFV_GRAFT_META_PREFIX}build.json"
305	
306	  jq -n \
307	    --slurpfile zjq_steps       "${z_combined_steps}" \
308	    --arg zjq_sa                "${z_mason_sa}" \
309	    --arg zjq_gar_host          "${z_gar_host}" \
310	    --arg zjq_gar_path          "${z_gar_path}" \
311	    --arg zjq_hallmarks_root    "${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}" \
312	    --arg zjq_hallmark          "${z_hallmark}" \
313	    --arg zjq_vessel            "${RBRV_SIGIL}" \
314	    --arg zjq_git_commit        "${z_git_commit}" \
315	    --arg zjq_git_branch        "${z_git_branch}" \
316	    --arg zjq_git_repo          "${z_git_repo}" \
317	    --arg zjq_graft_source      "${z_graft_source}" \
318	    --arg zjq_dockerfile        "${z_dockerfile_content}" \
319	    --arg zjq_vi_ref_1          "${z_vi_ref_1}" \
320	    --arg zjq_vi_prov_1         "${z_vi_prov_1}" \
321	    --arg zjq_vi_ref_2          "${z_vi_ref_2}" \
322	    --arg zjq_vi_prov_2         "${z_vi_prov_2}" \
323	    --arg zjq_vi_ref_3          "${z_vi_ref_3}" \
324	    --arg zjq_vi_prov_3         "${z_vi_prov_3}" \
325	    --arg zjq_pool              "${RBDC_POOL_AIRGAP}" \
326	    --arg zjq_timeout           "${RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT}" \
327	    '{
328	      steps: $zjq_steps[0],
329	      substitutions: {
330	        _RBGA_GAR_HOST:              $zjq_gar_host,
331	        _RBGA_GAR_PATH:              $zjq_gar_path,
332	        _RBGA_HALLMARKS_ROOT:        $zjq_hallmarks_root,
333	        _RBGA_HALLMARK:              $zjq_hallmark,
334	        _RBGA_VESSEL:                $zjq_vessel,
335	        _RBGA_VESSEL_MODE:           "graft",
336	        _RBGA_GIT_COMMIT:            $zjq_git_commit,
337	        _RBGA_GIT_BRANCH:            $zjq_git_branch,
338	        _RBGA_GIT_REPO:              $zjq_git_repo,
339	        _RBGA_BUILD_ID:              "",
340	        _RBGA_INSCRIBE_TIMESTAMP:    "",
341	        _RBGA_BIND_SOURCE:           "",
342	        _RBGA_GRAFT_SOURCE:          $zjq_graft_source,
343	        _RBGA_DOCKERFILE_CONTENT:    $zjq_dockerfile,
344	        _RBGV_GAR_HOST:              $zjq_gar_host,
345	        _RBGV_GAR_PATH:              $zjq_gar_path,
346	        _RBGV_HALLMARKS_ROOT:        $zjq_hallmarks_root,
347	        _RBGV_HALLMARK:              $zjq_hallmark,
348	        _RBGV_VESSEL:                $zjq_vessel,
349	        _RBGV_VESSEL_MODE:           "graft",
350	        _RBGV_BIND_SOURCE:           "",
351	        _RBGV_GRAFT_SOURCE:          $zjq_graft_source,
352	        _RBGV_IMAGE_1:               $zjq_vi_ref_1,
353	        _RBGV_IMAGE_1_PROVENANCE:    $zjq_vi_prov_1,
354	        _RBGV_IMAGE_2:               $zjq_vi_ref_2,
355	        _RBGV_IMAGE_2_PROVENANCE:    $zjq_vi_prov_2,
356	        _RBGV_IMAGE_3:               $zjq_vi_ref_3,
357	        _RBGV_IMAGE_3_PROVENANCE:    $zjq_vi_prov_3
358	      },
359	      serviceAccount: $zjq_sa,
360	      options: {
361	        automapSubstitutions: true,
362	        logging: "CLOUD_LOGGING_ONLY",
363	        pool: { name: $zjq_pool }
364	      },
365	      timeout: $zjq_timeout
366	    }' > "${z_build_file}" \
367	    || buc_die "Failed to compose combined about+vouch build JSON"
368	
369	  buc_log_args "Combined about+vouch build JSON: ${z_build_file}"
370	
371	  buc_step "Submitting combined about+vouch Cloud Build"
372	  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${ZRBFC_GCB_PROJECT_BUILDS_URL}" "${z_token}" \
373	    "graft_meta_build_create" "${z_build_file}"
374	  rbgu_http_require_ok "Combined about+vouch build submission" "graft_meta_build_create"
375	
376	  local z_build_id=""
377	  z_build_id=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "graft_meta_build_create" '.metadata.build.id') || z_build_id=""
378	  test -n "${z_build_id}" || buc_die "Build ID not found in builds.create response"
379	  echo "${z_build_id}" > "${ZRBFC_BUILD_ID_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to persist build ID"
380	
381	  local -r z_console_url="${ZRBFC_CLOUD_QUERY_BASE};region=${RBGD_GCB_REGION}/${z_build_id}?project=${RBGD_GCB_PROJECT_ID}"
382	  buc_info "Combined about+vouch build submitted: ${z_build_id}"
383	  buc_link "Click to " "Open build in Cloud Console" "${z_console_url}"
384	
385	  zrbfc_wait_build_completion 100 "About+Vouch"  # ~8 minutes at 5s intervals
386	
387	  buc_success "About+Vouch complete: ${z_hallmark}"
388	  buc_info "About artifact: ${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${z_hallmark}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ABOUT}:${z_hallmark}"
389	  buc_info "Vouch artifact: ${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${z_hallmark}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_VOUCH}:${z_hallmark}"
390	}
391	
392	# Internal: submit about Cloud Build job and wait for completion
393	zrbfv_about_submit() {
394	  zrbfv_sentinel
395	
396	  local -r z_hallmark="$1"
397	  local -r z_token="$2"
398	  local -r z_conjure_build_id="${3:-}"
399	
400	  buc_step "Constructing about Cloud Build resource"
401	  local -r z_gar_host="${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}"
402	  local -r z_gar_path="${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
403	  local -r z_mason_sa="projects/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/serviceAccounts/${RBGD_MASON_EMAIL}"
404	
405	  # Determine mode-specific substitution values
406	  local z_vessel_mode="${RBRV_VESSEL_MODE}"
407	  local z_bind_source=""
408	  local z_graft_source=""
409	  local z_inscribe_ts=""
410	  local z_dockerfile_content=""
411	  # Cloud Build substitution values are limited to 4096 bytes. We use 4000 as a
412	  # conservative guard to account for encoding overhead and avoid edge-case failures.
413	  local -r z_dockerfile_max_bytes=4000
414	  local -r z_df_size_file="${ZRBFV_ABOUT_PREFIX}df_size.txt"
415	
416	  case "${z_vessel_mode}" in
417	    conjure)
418	      # Extract inscribe timestamp from hallmark (e.g., c260305133650 from c260305133650-r260305160530)
419	      z_inscribe_ts="${z_hallmark%%-r*}"
420	      # Read Dockerfile content for recipe.txt
421	      if test -f "${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE:-}"; then
422	        wc -c < "${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE}" > "${z_df_size_file}" \
423	          || buc_die "Failed to measure Dockerfile size"
424	        local z_df_size=""
425	        z_df_size=$(<"${z_df_size_file}")
426	        z_df_size="${z_df_size// /}"  # Strip spaces (wc output varies by platform)
427	        if test "${z_df_size}" -le "${z_dockerfile_max_bytes}"; then
428	          z_dockerfile_content=$(<"${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE}")
429	        else
430	          buc_warn "Dockerfile exceeds 4KB substitution limit (${z_df_size} bytes) — recipe.txt omitted"
431	        fi
432	      fi
433	      ;;
434	    bind)
435	      z_bind_source="${RBRV_BIND_IMAGE:-}"
436	      if test -n "${RBRV_BIND_OPTIONAL_DOCKERFILE:-}" && test -f "${RBRV_BIND_OPTIONAL_DOCKERFILE}"; then
437	        wc -c < "${RBRV_BIND_OPTIONAL_DOCKERFILE}" > "${z_df_size_file}" \
438	          || buc_die "Failed to measure Dockerfile size"
439	        local z_df_size=""
440	        z_df_size=$(<"${z_df_size_file}")
441	        z_df_size="${z_df_size// /}"  # Strip spaces (wc output varies by platform)
442	        if test "${z_df_size}" -le "${z_dockerfile_max_bytes}"; then
443	          z_dockerfile_content=$(<"${RBRV_BIND_OPTIONAL_DOCKERFILE}")
444	        else
445	          buc_warn "Dockerfile exceeds 4KB substitution limit (${z_df_size} bytes) — recipe.txt omitted"
446	        fi
447	      fi
448	      ;;
449	    graft)
450	      z_graft_source="${RBRV_GRAFT_IMAGE:-}"
451	      if test -n "${RBRV_GRAFT_OPTIONAL_DOCKERFILE:-}" && test -f "${RBRV_GRAFT_OPTIONAL_DOCKERFILE}"; then
452	        wc -c < "${RBRV_GRAFT_OPTIONAL_DOCKERFILE}" > "${z_df_size_file}" \
453	          || buc_die "Failed to measure Dockerfile size"
454	        local z_df_size=""
455	        z_df_size=$(<"${z_df_size_file}")
456	        z_df_size="${z_df_size// /}"  # Strip spaces (wc output varies by platform)
457	        if test "${z_df_size}" -le "${z_dockerfile_max_bytes}"; then
458	          z_dockerfile_content=$(<"${RBRV_GRAFT_OPTIONAL_DOCKERFILE}")
459	        else
460	          buc_warn "Dockerfile exceeds 4KB substitution limit (${z_df_size} bytes) — recipe.txt omitted"
461	        fi
462	      fi
463	      ;;
464	    *)
465	      buc_die "Unknown vessel mode: ${z_vessel_mode}"
466	      ;;
467	  esac
468	
469	  # Git metadata (shared temp files, idempotent)
470	  zrbfc_ensure_git_metadata
471	  local z_git_commit=""
472	  z_git_commit=$(<"${ZRBFC_GIT_COMMIT_FILE}")
473	  local z_git_branch=""
474	  z_git_branch=$(<"${ZRBFC_GIT_BRANCH_FILE}")
475	  local z_git_repo=""
476	  z_git_repo=$(<"${ZRBFC_GIT_REPO_FILE}")
477	
478	  # Assemble about steps via shared helper
479	  local -r z_about_steps_accumulator="${ZRBFV_ABOUT_PREFIX}steps.json"
480	  zrbfc_assemble_about_steps "${z_about_steps_accumulator}" "${ZRBFV_ABOUT_PREFIX}"
481	
482	  buc_log_args "Composing about Build resource JSON"
483	  local -r z_about_build_file="${ZRBFV_ABOUT_PREFIX}build.json"
484	
485	  jq -n \
486	    --slurpfile zjq_steps    "${z_about_steps_accumulator}" \
487	    --arg zjq_sa             "${z_mason_sa}" \
488	    --arg zjq_gar_host       "${z_gar_host}" \
489	    --arg zjq_gar_path       "${z_gar_path}" \
490	    --arg zjq_hallmarks_root "${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}" \
491	    --arg zjq_hallmark       "${z_hallmark}" \
492	    --arg zjq_vessel         "${RBRV_SIGIL}" \
493	    --arg zjq_vessel_mode    "${z_vessel_mode}" \
494	    --arg zjq_git_commit     "${z_git_commit}" \
495	    --arg zjq_git_branch     "${z_git_branch}" \
496	    --arg zjq_git_repo       "${z_git_repo}" \
497	    --arg zjq_build_id       "${z_conjure_build_id}" \
498	    --arg zjq_inscribe_ts    "${z_inscribe_ts}" \
499	    --arg zjq_bind_source    "${z_bind_source}" \
500	    --arg zjq_graft_source   "${z_graft_source}" \
501	    --arg zjq_dockerfile     "${z_dockerfile_content}" \
502	    --arg zjq_pool           "${RBDC_POOL_AIRGAP}" \
503	    --arg zjq_timeout        "${RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT}" \
504	    '{
505	      steps: $zjq_steps[0],
506	      substitutions: {
507	        _RBGA_GAR_HOST:              $zjq_gar_host,
508	        _RBGA_GAR_PATH:              $zjq_gar_path,
509	        _RBGA_HALLMARKS_ROOT:        $zjq_hallmarks_root,
510	        _RBGA_HALLMARK:              $zjq_hallmark,
511	        _RBGA_VESSEL:                $zjq_vessel,
512	        _RBGA_VESSEL_MODE:           $zjq_vessel_mode,
513	        _RBGA_GIT_COMMIT:            $zjq_git_commit,
514	        _RBGA_GIT_BRANCH:            $zjq_git_branch,
515	        _RBGA_GIT_REPO:              $zjq_git_repo,
516	        _RBGA_BUILD_ID:              $zjq_build_id,
517	        _RBGA_INSCRIBE_TIMESTAMP:    $zjq_inscribe_ts,
518	        _RBGA_BIND_SOURCE:           $zjq_bind_source,
519	        _RBGA_GRAFT_SOURCE:          $zjq_graft_source,
520	        _RBGA_DOCKERFILE_CONTENT:    $zjq_dockerfile
521	      },
522	      serviceAccount: $zjq_sa,
523	      options: {
524	        automapSubstitutions: true,
525	        logging: "CLOUD_LOGGING_ONLY",
526	        pool: { name: $zjq_pool }
527	      },
528	      timeout: $zjq_timeout
529	    }' > "${z_about_build_file}" \
530	    || buc_die "Failed to compose about build JSON"
531	
532	  buc_log_args "About build JSON: ${z_about_build_file}"
533	
534	  buc_step "Submitting about Cloud Build"
535	  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${ZRBFC_GCB_PROJECT_BUILDS_URL}" "${z_token}" \
536	    "about_build_create" "${z_about_build_file}"
537	  rbgu_http_require_ok "About build submission" "about_build_create"
538	
539	  local z_build_id=""
540	  z_build_id=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "about_build_create" '.metadata.build.id') || z_build_id=""
541	  test -n "${z_build_id}" || buc_die "Build ID not found in builds.create response"
542	  echo "${z_build_id}" > "${ZRBFC_BUILD_ID_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to persist build ID"
543	
544	  local -r z_console_url="${ZRBFC_CLOUD_QUERY_BASE};region=${RBGD_GCB_REGION}/${z_build_id}?project=${RBGD_GCB_PROJECT_ID}"
545	  buc_info "About build submitted: ${z_build_id}"
546	  buc_link "Click to " "Open build in Cloud Console" "${z_console_url}"
547	
548	  zrbfc_wait_build_completion 50 "About"  # ~4 minutes at 5s intervals (private pool)
549	}

551	######################################################################
552	# Vouch
553	
554	rbfv_vouch() {
555	  zrbfv_sentinel
556	
557	  local -r z_vessel_dir="${1:-}"
558	  local -r z_hallmark="${2:-}"
559	
560	  buc_doc_brief "Vouch for an ark by mode-aware verification in Cloud Build"
561	  buc_doc_param "vessel_dir" "Path to vessel directory containing rbrv.env"
562	  buc_doc_param "hallmark" "Full hallmark (e.g., c260305133650-r260305160530)"
563	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
564	
565	  if test -z "${z_vessel_dir}"; then
566	    local z_sigils
567	    z_sigils=$(rbrv_list_capture) || buc_die "No vessels found"
568	    buc_step "Available vessels:"
569	    local z_sigil=""
570	    for z_sigil in ${z_sigils}; do
571	      buc_bare "        ${RBRR_VESSEL_DIR}/${z_sigil}"
572	    done
573	    buc_die "Vessel directory required"
574	  fi
575	
576	  zrbfc_load_vessel "${z_vessel_dir}"
577	  test -n "${z_hallmark}" || buc_die "Hallmark parameter required"
578	
579	  # Resolve tool images from reliquary (vouch steps use tool images)
580	  zrbfc_resolve_tool_images
581	
582	  buc_step "Loading Director RBRA credentials"
583	  source "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to source Director RBRA"
584	
585	  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
586	  local z_token=""
587	  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") \
588	    || buc_die "Failed to get Director OAuth token"
589	
590	  # Gate: require about exists (about must complete before vouch)
591	  buc_step "Gating on about artifact existence"
592	  local -r z_hallmark_subtree="${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${z_hallmark}"
593	  local -r z_about_gate_status="${ZRBFV_VOUCH_PREFIX}about_status.txt"
594	  local -r z_about_gate_response="${ZRBFV_VOUCH_PREFIX}about_response.json"
595	  local -r z_about_gate_stderr="${ZRBFV_VOUCH_PREFIX}about_stderr.txt"
596	
597	  curl --head -s \
598	    --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
599	    --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
600	    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
601	    -H "Accept: ${ZRBFC_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}" \
602	    -w "%{http_code}" \
603	    -o "${z_about_gate_response}" \
604	    "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_hallmark_subtree}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ABOUT}/manifests/${z_hallmark}" \
605	    > "${z_about_gate_status}" 2>"${z_about_gate_stderr}" \
606	    || buc_die "HEAD request failed for about artifact — see ${z_about_gate_stderr}"
607	
608	  local -r z_about_http_code=$(<"${z_about_gate_status}")
609	  test -n "${z_about_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for about"
610	  test "${z_about_http_code}" = "200" \
611	    || buc_die "About artifact not found (HTTP ${z_about_http_code}) — about must complete before vouch"
612	
613	  buc_info "About artifact confirmed: ${z_hallmark_subtree}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ABOUT}:${z_hallmark}"
614	
615	  # Gate: warn if vouch already exists (re-vouch)
616	  local -r z_vouch_gate_status="${ZRBFV_VOUCH_PREFIX}vouch_status.txt"
617	  local -r z_vouch_gate_response="${ZRBFV_VOUCH_PREFIX}vouch_response.json"
618	  local -r z_vouch_gate_stderr="${ZRBFV_VOUCH_PREFIX}vouch_stderr.txt"
619	
620	  curl --head -s \
621	    --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
622	    --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
623	    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
624	    -H "Accept: ${ZRBFC_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}" \
625	    -w "%{http_code}" \
626	    -o "${z_vouch_gate_response}" \
627	    "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_hallmark_subtree}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_VOUCH}/manifests/${z_hallmark}" \
628	    > "${z_vouch_gate_status}" 2>"${z_vouch_gate_stderr}" \
629	    || buc_die "HEAD request failed for vouch artifact — see ${z_vouch_gate_stderr}"
630	
631	  local -r z_vouch_http_code=$(<"${z_vouch_gate_status}")
632	  test -n "${z_vouch_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for vouch"
633	  if test "${z_vouch_http_code}" = "200"; then
634	    buc_warn "Re-vouch in progress: ${z_hallmark_subtree}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_VOUCH}:${z_hallmark} already exists"
635	  fi
636	
637	  # All modes use Cloud Build for vouch (mode-aware verification inside the build)
638	  zrbfv_vouch_submit "${z_hallmark}" "${z_token}"
639	
640	  buc_success "Vouch complete: ${z_hallmark}"
641	  buc_info "Vouch artifact: ${z_hallmark_subtree}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_VOUCH}:${z_hallmark}"
642	}
643	
644	# Internal: Submit vouch Cloud Build job (mode-aware verification)
645	# All vessel modes use Cloud Build. The build scripts branch on _RBGV_VESSEL_MODE:
646	#   conjure: DSSE envelope signature verification (Python 3 + openssl)
647	#   bind: digest-pin comparison against upstream reference
648	#   graft: GRAFTED stamp (no verification)
649	zrbfv_vouch_submit() {
650	  zrbfv_sentinel
651	
652	  local -r z_hallmark="$1"
653	  local -r z_token="$2"
654	
655	  buc_step "Constructing vouch Cloud Build resource"
656	  local -r z_gar_host="${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}"
657	  local -r z_gar_path="${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
658	  local -r z_mason_sa="projects/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/serviceAccounts/${RBGD_MASON_EMAIL}"
659	
660	  # Mode-specific substitution values (empty strings for non-applicable modes)
661	  local z_bind_source=""
662	  local z_graft_source=""
663	
664	  case "${RBRV_VESSEL_MODE}" in
665	    conjure) : ;;  # DSSE verification uses embedded keys, no extra substitutions
666	    bind)    z_bind_source="${RBRV_BIND_IMAGE:-}" ;;
667	    graft)   z_graft_source="${RBRV_GRAFT_IMAGE:-}" ;;
668	    *)       buc_die "Unknown vessel mode: ${RBRV_VESSEL_MODE}" ;;
669	  esac
670	
671	  # Resolve base image provenance (for vouch summary recording)
672	  # New layout: anchored base images live at <ENSHRINES_ROOT>/<anchor>:<anchor>
673	  local -r z_vi_gar_repo_base="${z_gar_host}/${z_gar_path}"
674	  local z_vi_ref_1="" z_vi_ref_2="" z_vi_ref_3=""
675	  local z_vi_prov_1="" z_vi_prov_2="" z_vi_prov_3=""
676	  local z_vi_n="" z_vi_origin_var="" z_vi_anchor_var="" z_vi_origin="" z_vi_anchor=""
677	  for z_vi_n in 1 2 3; do
678	    z_vi_origin_var="RBRV_IMAGE_${z_vi_n}_ORIGIN"
679	    z_vi_anchor_var="RBRV_IMAGE_${z_vi_n}_ANCHOR"
680	    z_vi_origin="${!z_vi_origin_var:-}"
681	    z_vi_anchor="${!z_vi_anchor_var:-}"
682	    test -n "${z_vi_origin}" || continue
683	    local z_vi_ref="" z_vi_prov=""
684	    if test -n "${z_vi_anchor}"; then
685	      z_vi_ref="${z_vi_gar_repo_base}/${RBGL_ENSHRINES_ROOT}/${z_vi_anchor}:${z_vi_anchor}"
686	      z_vi_prov="anchored"
687	    else
688	      z_vi_ref="${z_vi_origin}"
689	      z_vi_prov="pass-through"
690	    fi
691	    case "${z_vi_n}" in
692	      1) z_vi_ref_1="${z_vi_ref}"; z_vi_prov_1="${z_vi_prov}" ;;
693	      2) z_vi_ref_2="${z_vi_ref}"; z_vi_prov_2="${z_vi_prov}" ;;
694	      3) z_vi_ref_3="${z_vi_ref}"; z_vi_prov_3="${z_vi_prov}" ;;
695	    esac
696	  done
697	
698	  # Assemble vouch steps via shared helper
699	  local -r z_vouch_steps_accumulator="${ZRBFV_VOUCH_PREFIX}steps.json"
700	  zrbfc_assemble_vouch_steps "${z_vouch_steps_accumulator}" "${ZRBFV_VOUCH_PREFIX}"
701	
702	  buc_log_args "Composing vouch Build resource JSON"
703	  local -r z_vouch_build_file="${ZRBFV_VOUCH_PREFIX}build.json"
704	
705	  jq -n \
706	    --slurpfile zjq_steps    "${z_vouch_steps_accumulator}" \
707	    --arg zjq_sa             "${z_mason_sa}" \
708	    --arg zjq_gar_host       "${z_gar_host}" \
709	    --arg zjq_gar_path       "${z_gar_path}" \
710	    --arg zjq_hallmarks_root "${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}" \
711	    --arg zjq_hallmark       "${z_hallmark}" \
712	    --arg zjq_vessel         "${RBRV_SIGIL}" \
713	    --arg zjq_vessel_mode    "${RBRV_VESSEL_MODE}" \
714	    --arg zjq_bind_source    "${z_bind_source}" \
715	    --arg zjq_graft_source   "${z_graft_source}" \
716	    --arg zjq_vi_ref_1       "${z_vi_ref_1}" \
717	    --arg zjq_vi_prov_1      "${z_vi_prov_1}" \
718	    --arg zjq_vi_ref_2       "${z_vi_ref_2}" \
719	    --arg zjq_vi_prov_2      "${z_vi_prov_2}" \
720	    --arg zjq_vi_ref_3       "${z_vi_ref_3}" \
721	    --arg zjq_vi_prov_3      "${z_vi_prov_3}" \
722	    --arg zjq_pool           "${RBDC_POOL_AIRGAP}" \
723	    --arg zjq_timeout        "${RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT}" \
724	    '{
725	      steps: $zjq_steps[0],
726	      substitutions: {
727	        _RBGV_GAR_HOST:           $zjq_gar_host,
728	        _RBGV_GAR_PATH:           $zjq_gar_path,
729	        _RBGV_HALLMARKS_ROOT:     $zjq_hallmarks_root,
730	        _RBGV_HALLMARK:           $zjq_hallmark,
731	        _RBGV_VESSEL:             $zjq_vessel,
732	        _RBGV_VESSEL_MODE:        $zjq_vessel_mode,
733	        _RBGV_BIND_SOURCE:        $zjq_bind_source,
734	        _RBGV_GRAFT_SOURCE:       $zjq_graft_source,
735	        _RBGV_IMAGE_1:            $zjq_vi_ref_1,
736	        _RBGV_IMAGE_1_PROVENANCE: $zjq_vi_prov_1,
737	        _RBGV_IMAGE_2:            $zjq_vi_ref_2,
738	        _RBGV_IMAGE_2_PROVENANCE: $zjq_vi_prov_2,
739	        _RBGV_IMAGE_3:            $zjq_vi_ref_3,
740	        _RBGV_IMAGE_3_PROVENANCE: $zjq_vi_prov_3
741	      },
742	      serviceAccount: $zjq_sa,
743	      options: {
744	        automapSubstitutions: true,
745	        logging: "CLOUD_LOGGING_ONLY",
746	        pool: { name: $zjq_pool }
747	      },
748	      timeout: $zjq_timeout
749	    }' > "${z_vouch_build_file}" \
750	    || buc_die "Failed to compose vouch build JSON"
751	
752	  buc_log_args "Vouch build JSON: ${z_vouch_build_file}"
753	
754	  buc_step "Submitting vouch Cloud Build"
755	  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${ZRBFC_GCB_PROJECT_BUILDS_URL}" "${z_token}" \
756	    "vouch_build_create" "${z_vouch_build_file}"
757	  rbgu_http_require_ok "Vouch build submission" "vouch_build_create"
758	
759	  local z_build_id=""
760	  z_build_id=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "vouch_build_create" '.metadata.build.id') || z_build_id=""
761	  test -n "${z_build_id}" || buc_die "Build ID not found in builds.create response"
762	  echo "${z_build_id}" > "${ZRBFC_BUILD_ID_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to persist build ID"
763	
764	  local -r z_console_url="${ZRBFC_CLOUD_QUERY_BASE};region=${RBGD_GCB_REGION}/${z_build_id}?project=${RBGD_GCB_PROJECT_ID}"
765	  buc_info "Vouch build submitted: ${z_build_id}"
766	  buc_link "Click to " "Open build in Cloud Console" "${z_console_url}"
767	
768	  zrbfc_wait_build_completion 50 "Vouch"  # ~4 minutes at 5s intervals (private pool is slower)
769	}

771	######################################################################
772	# Batch Vouch
773	
774	rbfv_batch_vouch() {
775	  zrbfv_sentinel
776	
777	  buc_doc_brief "Vouch every pending hallmark (image+about present, vouch absent)"
778	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
779	
780	  buc_step "Loading Director RBRA credentials"
781	  source "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to source Director RBRA"
782	
783	  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
784	  local z_token=""
785	  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") \
786	    || buc_die "Failed to get Director OAuth token"
787	
788	  buc_step "Enumerating hallmarks under ${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/"
789	  zrbfc_list_hallmarks_capture "${z_token}"
790	
791	  # Load-then-iterate. A synthetic sentinel element appended to the array
792	  # lets the final hallmark flush through the same boundary branch as every
793	  # intermediate one (single flush site).
794	  local z_lines=()
795	  local z_line=""
796	  while IFS= read -r z_line || test -n "${z_line}"; do
797	    z_lines+=("${z_line}")
798	  done < "${ZRBFC_HALLMARK_LIST_FILE}"
799	  z_lines+=("__SENTINEL__ __SENTINEL__")
800	
801	  # Pass 1: state machine identifies pending hallmarks (image+about present,
802	  # vouch absent). Accumulate into an array rather than a file so the later
803	  # processing loop can iterate in-memory (no FD held open across rbfv_vouch
804	  # calls, which issue curl/source and would silently consume loop stdin).
805	  local z_pending=()
806	  local z_prev_h=""
807	  local z_prev_img=0 z_prev_abt=0 z_prev_vch=0
808	  local z_i="" z_h="" z_b=""
809	
810	  for z_i in "${!z_lines[@]}"; do
811	    z_line="${z_lines[$z_i]}"
812	    test -n "${z_line}" || continue
813	
814	    z_h="${z_line%% *}"
815	    z_b="${z_line#* }"
816	    test -n "${z_h}" || continue
817	    test -n "${z_b}" || continue
818	
819	    if test "${z_h}" != "${z_prev_h}"; then
820	      if test -n "${z_prev_h}"; then
821	        if test "${z_prev_img}" = "1" \
822	          && test "${z_prev_abt}" = "1" \
823	          && test "${z_prev_vch}" != "1"; then
824	          z_pending+=("${z_prev_h}")
825	        fi
826	      fi
827	
828	      case "${z_h}" in
829	        __SENTINEL__) break ;;
830	      esac
831	
832	      z_prev_h="${z_h}"
833	      z_prev_img=0
834	      z_prev_abt=0
835	      z_prev_vch=0
836	    fi
837	
838	    case "${z_b}" in
839	      "${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE}") z_prev_img=1 ;;
840	      "${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ABOUT}") z_prev_abt=1 ;;
841	      "${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_VOUCH}") z_prev_vch=1 ;;
842	    esac
843	  done
844	
845	  # Forensic record of pending set.
846	  local -r z_pending_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfv_batch_pending.txt"
847	  : > "${z_pending_file}" || buc_die "Failed to initialize ${z_pending_file}"
848	  local z_j=""
849	  for z_j in "${!z_pending[@]}"; do
850	    printf '%s\n' "${z_pending[$z_j]}" >> "${z_pending_file}" \
851	      || buc_die "Failed to record pending hallmark ${z_pending[$z_j]}"
852	  done
853	
854	  local -r z_total="${#z_pending[@]}"
855	  case "${z_total}" in
856	    0)
857	      buc_info "No pending hallmarks found (no hallmark has image+about without vouch)"
858	      buc_success "Batch vouch complete — 0 hallmarks processed"
859	      return 0
860	      ;;
861	  esac
862	
863	  buc_info "Found ${z_total} pending hallmark(s) to vouch"
864	
865	  # Pass 2: for each pending hallmark, extract about ark, read vessel_name
866	  # from build_info.json, resolve vessel_dir, call rbfv_vouch. rbfv_vouch
867	  # fails via buc_die on any vouch failure — batch terminates fail-fast at
868	  # the broken hallmark rather than masking problems behind a summary count.
869	  local z_vouched_n=0 z_idx=0 z_vessel=""
870	  local z_hallmark="" z_about_extract="" z_about_pkg=""
871	  local z_build_info="" z_vessel_scratch="" z_vessel_dir=""
872	
873	  for z_j in "${!z_pending[@]}"; do
874	    z_hallmark="${z_pending[$z_j]}"
875	    test -n "${z_hallmark}" || continue
876	    z_idx=$(( z_idx + 1 ))
877	
878	    buc_step "[${z_idx}/${z_total}] Resolving vessel for ${z_hallmark}"
879	
880	    z_about_extract="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfv_batch_about_${z_hallmark}"
881	    z_about_pkg="${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${z_hallmark}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ABOUT}"
882	
883	    zrbfc_gar_extract_artifact "${z_token}" "${z_about_pkg}" "${z_hallmark}" "${z_about_extract}" \
884	      || buc_die "Failed to extract about ark for ${z_hallmark} (expected at ${z_about_pkg}:${z_hallmark})"
885	
886	    z_build_info="${z_about_extract}/build_info.json"
887	    test -f "${z_build_info}" \
888	      || buc_die "build_info.json missing in about ark for ${z_hallmark}"
889	
890	    z_vessel_scratch="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfv_batch_vessel.txt"
891	    jq -r '.vessel_name // empty' "${z_build_info}" > "${z_vessel_scratch}" \
892	      || buc_die "Failed to read vessel_name from ${z_build_info}"
893	    z_vessel=$(<"${z_vessel_scratch}")
894	    test -n "${z_vessel}" \
895	      || buc_die "vessel_name empty in about ark for ${z_hallmark}"
896	
897	    z_vessel_dir="${RBRR_VESSEL_DIR}/${z_vessel}"
898	    test -d "${z_vessel_dir}" \
899	      || buc_die "Vessel directory not found: ${z_vessel_dir} (from about build_info.vessel_name for ${z_hallmark})"
900	
901	    buc_info "Vouching ${z_hallmark} (vessel: ${z_vessel})"
902	    rbfv_vouch "${z_vessel_dir}" "${z_hallmark}"
903	    z_vouched_n=$(( z_vouched_n + 1 ))
904	  done
905	
906	  echo ""
907	  buc_success "Batch vouch complete — ${z_vouched_n}/${z_total} hallmark(s) vouched"
908	}
909	
910	# eof
911
